Initialize Memory"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\nmem = Memory()\nprint(f&quot;Initialized: {mem.db_path}&quot;)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"2. Store Information"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"code":"# Simple memory\nmem.remember(&quot;Alice is a backend engineer who prefers Go over Python.&quot;)\n\n# Structured memory with metadata\nmem.remember(\n  content=&quot;Project deadline moved to Friday.&quot;,\n  tags=[&quot;project-alpha&quot;, &quot;deadline&quot;],\n  importance=0.8,\n  source=&quot;slack&quot;,\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"3. Recall Information"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"code":"# Semantic search\nresults = mem.recall(&quot;What programming language does Alice prefer?&quot;)\n\n# Filtered search\nresults = mem.recall(\n  query=&quot;deadline&quot;,\n  tags=[&quot;project-alpha&quot;],\n  since=&quot;2026-04-01&quot;,\n)\n\n# Access a specific memory by ID\nmemory = mem.get(&quot;mem_abc123&quot;)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"4. Update and Delete"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"code":"# Update a memory\nmem.update(&quot;mem_abc123&quot;, content=&quot;Deadline moved to Monday.&quot;)\n\n# Delete a memory\nmem.forget(&quot;mem_abc123&quot;)\n\n# Bulk delete by tag\nmem.forget_all(tags=[&quot;temp&quot;])\n","language":"python"}],"\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La"],["$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14"],"$L15"]}],{},null,false,null]},null,false,"$@16"]},null,false,"$@16"]},null,false,null]},null,false,null],"$L17",false]],"m":"$undefined","G":["$18",["$L19"]],"S":true,"h":null,"s":"$undefined","l":"$undefined","p":"$undefined","d":"$undefined","b":"QQSqVRZ0L1fJQFST1lZ0f"}
